scope: PDO MySQL driver discovery through pdo_drivers and PDO::getAvailableDrivers
mysql: host, port, dbname, charset, and unix_socket DSN parsing through MysqlConnectOptions
opt-in live mysql: PDO DSN query and prepared statement smoke when PHRUST_MYSQL_TEST_DSN is set
target_gates: nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime pdo_mysql -- --nocapture
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_vm pdo -- --nocapture
PHPT_REUSE_LAST=0 PHPT_DEV_REUSE_TARGET_PASS=0 nix develop -c just phpt-dev-module MODULE=pdo_mysql
next_step: Promote upstream pdo_mysql statement and attribute PHPTs once native/emulated prepare and mysqlnd metadata parity are implemented.
